original_prompt: /oh-my-claudecode:autopilot 点击左侧工作区、仓库只打开当前绑定的会话消息列表，如图1。当点击按钮发送内容后就直接在后台xterm通过auto mode模式启动一个claude code。让会话输入框能够直接跟开启的claude code对话。
completion_summary: Task 1 (xterm memory leak): scrollback=1000 + 16KB/16ms emit batching + EOF self-remove. Task 2 Phase A: terminalClaudeAutostartStore + ensureClaudeStartedInTerminal in forwardComposerToTerminal. Phase B (single-session view) deferred per user choice (additive, not replacing).
